parameters.name: from_epoch
parameters.description: Epoch to start listing from (inclusive). Defaults to 0

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of checkpoints to return (default: 20, max: 100)

post.description: Fetches several substates by their IDs

parameters.name: local_search_only
parameters.description: If true, only search local storage for the substate

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Minimum version of the substate to fetch

get.description: List all template cached by this indexer

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results returned

get.description: List templates discovered on the network via the template catalogue

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor: return entries inserted after the row with this template address. Omit to start from the beginning

get.description: Get a single template catalogue entry by its address

500.description: Failed to fetch template catalogue entry

get.description: Fetch a template definition by its address

404.description: Template not found or still pending

get.description: Get the transaction receipt by transaction ID

post.description: Submit a transaction to validators responsible for the involved shards

500.description: Failed to submit transaction due to an internal error

503.description: All validators failed to process the transaction

post.description: Submit a transaction as a dry-run

500.description: Failed to process dry-run transaction due to an internal error

get.description: SSE stream of template-emitted transaction events. Supports catch-up via the `after_id` query parameter or `Last-Event-ID` header.

parameters.name: resource_address
parameters.description: Filter by resource address (derived from substate_id for std.resource.* events, or from the `resource_address` payload entry for std.vault.deposit / std.vault.withdraw)

get.description: Get the result of a submitted transaction (by transaction ID)

post.description: Gets full UTXO data for a list of UTXO IDs

400.description: Too many UTXOs requested or invalid parameters

500.description: Failed to start UTXO update stream

get.description: Request will return an empty result when the indexer is ready to serve requests. This may take an indefinite amount of time after startup.

current_epoch.description: The current epoch according to the indexer's epoch oracle view

validators.description:
Per-validator consensus state as last observed by this indexer while
syncing from the network. Populated lazily, so validators that have
never been contacted for a sync will not appear here. Each entry
carries an `observed_at_unix_s` timestamp so callers can judge whether
the reading is fresh.

result.description:
The result of the transaction, which may be pending (not yet finalized) or finalized with details such as the
final decision, execution result, and timestamps

The result of the dry-run execution, including any emitted events and state changes, but without a final
decision or commitment to the ledger

transaction_id.description: The ID of the transaction that was dry-run
The ID of the submitted transaction

metadata_hash.description: Optional multihash of off-chain CBOR metadata

ValidatorStatus.description:
A snapshot of one validator's consensus pacemaker state as observed by the
indexer during a recent sync round.

observed_at_unix_s.description:
Unix timestamp (seconds) at which this snapshot was captured. Clients
can derive the freshness of the snapshot by comparing this to the
current wall-clock time.
